auth.label: Write Key
auth.description: Segment source write key sent as the writeKey JSON body field. Open the Segment app, select a source, then copy its write key from the source settings: https://segment.com/docs/connections/find-writekey/.

actions.name: alias
actions.description: Send a Segment Alias call to associate one user identity with another.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user in your database.

previousId.description: Previous unique identifier for the user.

context.description: Segment context object with extra information about the event.

integrations.description: Segment destination flags keyed by destination name.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message took place, in ISO 8601 format.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent to Segment, in ISO 8601 format.

messageId.description: Unique message identifier used by Segment for deduplication.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Segment Alias call.

accepted.description: Whether Segment accepted the HTTP request.

raw.description: Raw response payload returned by Segment, or null when the body is empty.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Segment HTTP API acceptance response.

actions.name: batch
actions.description: Send a Segment Batch call containing Identify, Group, Track, Page, or Screen items.

type.description: Segment event type for this batch item.

batch.description: Segment event items to send in this batch.

context.description: Segment context object with extra information about the event.

integrations.description: Segment destination flags keyed by destination name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Segment Batch call.

accepted.description: Whether Segment accepted the HTTP request.

raw.description: Raw response payload returned by Segment, or null when the body is empty.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Segment HTTP API acceptance response.

actions.name: group

anonymousId.description: Pseudo-unique anonymous identifier for the user.

context.description: Segment context object with extra information about the event.

integrations.description: Segment destination flags keyed by destination name.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message took place, in ISO 8601 format.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent to Segment, in ISO 8601 format.

messageId.description: Unique message identifier used by Segment for deduplication.

groupId.description: Unique identifier for the group in your database.

traits.description: Free-form traits associated with the group.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Segment Group call.

accepted.description: Whether Segment accepted the HTTP request.

raw.description: Raw response payload returned by Segment, or null when the body is empty.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Segment HTTP API acceptance response.

actions.name: track

integrations.description: Segment destination flags keyed by destination name.
